items.title: 연말 시즌 앞두고 명품 가격 'N차 인상'···"한국만 배짱장사" 비판 확산
items.summary: Report on repeated undisclosed luxury price hikes in Korea, naming Gucci's Marmont mini shoulder bag rising from KRW 2.22M to 2.43M (+9.5%) alongside other silent increases on Ophidia totes and more. Consumer criticism centers on brands allegedly overcharging Korean shoppers specifically ("배짱장사"), compounding post-pandemic price fatigue that analysts link to the sector's recent sales slump.

items.title: China reacts to Gucci and Versace leadership shake-up
items.summary: Analysis of mixed Chinese consumer reaction to Demna's appointment at Gucci, noting divergence between online excitement and skepticism. Demna's Milan debut got a VIP broadcast event with Beijing celebrities that spurred a brief online attention spike fading within two days; questions remain whether his streetwear-driven Balenciaga playbook fits Gucci's more heritage-conscious Chinese customer base, and whether talkability is converting into actual sales.

items.title: 新たな季節とともに、ラッキーデーを彩る日本限定を含むウィメンズ新作スモールレザーグッズコレクションが登場
items.summary: Official Kering Japan press release announcing a Japan-exclusive GG Marmont small leather goods capsule (zip wallets, bifolds, card cases, key cases in light pink/light blue) timed to July 19's auspicious calendar date (tenshabi/ichiryu-manbaibi/taian convergence). Standard activation/retail news via official corporate channel.

items.title: 아니, 한남동 '구찌 가옥' 폐점하나요?(했나요?)
items.summary: Korean Threads user post questioning whether Gucci's Hannam-dong 'Gucci Gaok' flagship near Foundry Seoul gallery has closed, noting the gallery disappeared from maps and speculating about the flagship's status. Small-reach organic consumer post reflecting on-the-ground uncertainty about Gucci's Seoul retail footprint amid the broader store-closure narrative; no official confirmation found.

items.title: #Gucci全球首席营销官发肖战# trending topic
items.summary: Weibo hashtag topic trending after Gucci's global CMO personally reposted brand ambassador Xiao Zhan's White Magnolia Awards look (two Gucci 2027 spring menswear pieces, global premiere) on personal social account - an unusually high-profile executive endorsement. Fan commentary frames it as a new benchmark for luxury-celebrity treatment in China; primarily fan-enthusiasm engagement rather than broad public sentiment.

items.title: 할머니 집에서 나온 구찌
items.summary: Community forum post on FMKorea (best/popular board) referencing an old Gucci item found at a grandmother's house, riffing colloquially off the same "grandma's house" phrase Kering's CEO used to describe outdated Gucci store aesthetics. Illustrates how the executive's blunt remark has seeped into casual Korean online humor/discourse about the brand's dated image.

items.title: 賛否両論のデムナの「グッチ」は10点満点中の何点？ 業界アナリストが辛口リポート
items.summary: WWD Japan trade analysis compiling luxury sector analysts' scored reactions to Demna's debut Gucci collection, describing the reception as split between praise for creative direction and concern over commercial viability. Cites analyst commentary that Gucci's brand identity risks further dilution if the avant-garde direction fails to resonate with core heritage-conscious clientele across Asia.

items.title: 最強開運日に手に入れたい。「グッチ」の日本限定ウォレット＆レザーグッズ
items.summary: Japanese lifestyle media coverage of the same Japan-exclusive GG Marmont capsule collection tied to the July 19 lucky-day calendar convergence, aimed at Japanese consumers. Standard product/activation coverage; positive framing typical of brand-adjacent lifestyle press.

items.title: 「グッチ フローラ」が新フレグランス発売 香水着想の限定メイクアップコレクションも
items.summary: Gucci Beauty announces a new Flora fragrance, 'Gucci Flora Gorgeous Orchid Eau de Parfum Intense,' launching Sept 1, 2026, fronted by Miley Cyrus, with a limited eyeshadow palette and two lipstick shades sold alongside it. Standard activation-style beauty news out of Japan trade press ahead of the Coty-to-L'Oreal license handover.
